cases.prompt: Add the usual auth, form validation, loading, and responsive scenarios to web-ux-test/plan.yaml.
cases.expected_output: The existing plan is updated with matching scenario-library modules and validated for duplicate IDs and safety.
assertions: Does not add credentials or destructive actions.

cases.prompt: Our plan already covers navigation but misses stale storage, expired sessions, and API error handling. Fill those gaps.
cases.expected_output: Targeted state recovery, auth, and error-handling scenarios are added or refined without duplicating existing navigation coverage.
assertions: Adds only scenarios whose preconditions match the plan.

cases.prompt: Start a brand-new web UX testing plan for my app.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger; plan creation belongs to generate-web-ux-test-plan.
assertions: Does not use this skill for initial plan creation.
